creator: vivek@khera.org
text:
In bug #213223 databases/db6 was patched to use the mutex from the machine/atomic.h header.

Given that, should netatalk3 be marked "broken" for DB < 6 or can this same patch to use atomic.h work with db5?

I think ideally if db5 can be patched, then the official packages can have a working netatalk3 since they are built against db5 by default.
